items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Attendance tracking separate from direct bookings', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for separate attendance tracking, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of this functionality being implemented or validated. Therefore, the evidence is inconclusive regarding this specific requirement.
